sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 24:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 24:1
items.html: In the second expansion, when the light of Keter did not return there but remained in the Peh, hence, the light of Hochma came and clothed in the vessel of Keter, and the light of Bina in the vessel of Hochma, etc., you find that Keter descended to the degree of Hochma, and Hochma descended to the degree of Bina, etc. (Item 10)
